'''Otome Mafai''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]] for most of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When his general was imprisoned on [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]] after refusing an order to kill civilians, fellow stormtrooper [[Gana Lant]] convinced Mafai and [[Kalaan defectors|eight other stormtroopers]] who had served under Tantor to put the man who had pulled them through battle after battle over the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that had turned on him.

In what turned out to be a catastrophic error, [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] assigned them to guard Tantor in his outdoor cell. Lant [[Escape from Kalaan|freed]] Tantor and informed him of the squad's loyalty. With Tantor freed, the stormtroopers stole the [[Tracked Mobile Base|TR-MB prototype]] and stormed the [[Kalaan prison|prison]], freeing [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The group trekked through Kalaan's canyons, picking up support from the [[Kalaanite resistance]] until they arrived at a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base set up by [[Tyr Taskeen]]. From there, they were taken to Taskeen's fleet, where would presumably have been imprisoned temporarily along with their general. When released, they most likely continued serving the Rebellion as [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|infantry]] under Tantor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
